rationale: Both reviews surface one confirmed, material generality finding: Review 1 correctly diagnoses that IsUnipotent uses Field/CommRing when CommSemiring/Ring suffice (visible in the variable block vs. the omit), and Review 2 correctly diagnoses that AlgPoints should be the full functor-of-points over arbitrary R rather than hardcoded k-points; neither additional finding (redundant instance vs. vacuous True fields) is primarily a generality issue, so acting on either review improves generality in a different but comparably significant way.
